notes: IMPORTANT: BattleScribe stores individual model entries (Intercessor, Intercessor Sergeant), NOT squad entries.
Wahapedia shows the full datasheet (squad). This is a structural unit-identity difference.
This ground truth covers the basic Intercessor trooper model only.
Squad-level presentation (combining models into a squad entry) is a UI/presentation policy decision.
Points: BattleScribe may store points at squad level, not per-model. Expect missingPoints or wrongPoints.
Used to validate basic stat/keyword/weapon pipeline on the Space Marines catalog fixture.
This catalog IS loaded in the test fixture, so this comparison runs in CI.
